notes: Self-update: sites pull CMS engine files from this repo (off / notify / auto modes, ~daily check), faithful HTML import with CSS preservation, Revisions fix, General Markup rename. Builds on the 1.2.0 SQLite backend (server-side Argon2id auth + encrypted secrets), Architect tier, and username-or-email login.
apiNote: admin/api.php holds this site's secrets (API token, Mailgun keys) and is never auto-updated. If a release changes api.php, update it by hand.
